channel.title: Machine Learning on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in Machine Learning on Frank Huang

item.title: Understanding RNN
item.description: Recently I’ve been wanting to have some kind of voice speaker which is able to read article in the form of pdf. The basic idea is to have a bot able to transform words into sound so that I don’t need to spend that much time on reading(Time is valuable you know ;) ). After some research on this topic, I found that most people use RNN to analyze the sequence data like text using tenserflow’s built-in api.
